svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="FQSOZOsUXzZoRhxQrmfL"> <mxGraphModel dx="1488" dy="960" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1300" pageHeight="760" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;rounded=0;" value="Cosmos 3 goodput observability — data flow" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="700" x="8" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;rounded=0;" value="Training pod (cosmos-framework on the AWS DLC image)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="430" width="420" x="8" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cb_fw" parent="pod" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="Framework callbacks
(MFU, sequence packing, grad-norm, iter speed)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="30" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="wandb" parent="pod" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999999;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="wandb.log()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="60" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bridge" parent="pod" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="wandb→OTLP bridge
(sample-added)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="40" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="otlpcb" parent="pod" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="OTLPCallback
(sample-added)
loss, step_time, iteration" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="126" width="120" x="270" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="exporter" parent="pod" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontStyle=1;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="OpenTelemetry OTLP exporter
(OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="60" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="addon" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;rounded=0;" value="HyperPod observability add-on (in-cluster, pre-existing)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="430" width="380" x="510" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="otlprx" parent="addon" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="OTLP receiver
hyperpod-otel-collector :4317" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="280" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dcgm" parent="addon" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="DCGM exporter + node exporters
(GR engine active, GPU util, HBM, power)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="280" x="40" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rw" parent="addon" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="Central collector
remote-write pipeline" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="80" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aws" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;rounded=0;" value="AWS managed services" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="430" width="320" x="967" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="amp" parent="aws" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="Amazon Managed Service
for Prometheus (AMP)
one workspace" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="60" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="amg" parent="aws" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="Amazon Managed Grafana
one unified goodput pane" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="60" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="cb_fw" style="rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" target="wandb"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="180" y="190" /> <mxPoint x="180" y="190" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="wandb" style="rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" target="bridge"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="180" y="270" /> <mxPoint x="180" y="270" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="bridge" style="rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" target="exporter"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="180" y="363" /> <mxPoint x="250" y="363" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="otlpcb" style="rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" target="exporter"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="370" y="363" /> <mxPoint x="250" y="363" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="exporter" style="rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;fontStyle=2;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" target="otlprx" value="OTLP&nbsp;<div>gRPC 4317 /&nbsp;</div><div>HTTP 4318</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.0901" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="470" y="420" /> <mxPoint x="470" y="158" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="otlprx" style="rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;fontStyle=2;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" target="rw" value="cosmos3_* metrics"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0128" y="-16" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="860" y="158" /> <mxPoint x="860" y="390" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="dcgm" style="rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;fontStyle=2;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" target="rw" value="DCGM_FI_* metrics"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="rw" style="rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;fontStyle=2;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" target="amp" value="remote-write"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.0994" as="geometry"> <mxPoint y="1" as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="930" y="410" /> <mxPoint x="930" y="225" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="amp" style="rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;fontStyle=2;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" target="amg" value="query"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
